description:
2026 Porsche 911 Turbo S, 3.6L F6, AWD, 701bhp, 7 Speed Automatic AED 1,499,000 or AED 23,484 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage only 35 KMs - Porsche Warranty Valid Until June 2028 - Brand New - GCC specification - Price includes VAT 
 - Crayon Leather Interior Exclusive Manufaktur (two-tone) - 20/21” Turbo S Wheels - Adaptive Sports Seats Plus, Electrical 18-Ways with Memory Package - Seat Ventilation - Lifting System Front Axle - Sports Tailpipes Titanium - ‘PORSCHE’ Log LED Door Courtesy Lights - Seat Belts Racing Yellow - Heated GT Sports Steering Wheel Leather - Passenger Footwell Storage Net - Surround View with Active Parking Support - Night Vision Assist - Smoking Package - Burmester High-End Surround Sound System
